subcodes.first_line: Canst thou abandon whatsoever the people possess, turning in this Day unto God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هل تقدر ان تدع ما عند القوم مقبلا فی هذا الیوم الی الله المهیمن القیوم و هل
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @firmness in the Covenant
